headline: Which S&P500 stocks are moving after the closing bell on Thursday?
summary: The regular session of the US market on Thursday is now over, but let's get a preview of the after-hours session and explore the top S&P500 gainers and losers driving the post-market movements.

headline: AXT (AXTI) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
